text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The injury Air Groove sustained during training is
hurting, so I take her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Tch... How foolish of me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I should have been more observant. This is
completely my fault.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I need to do whatever I can to make up for this
silly loss of time!
choice_data_list: Take it easy until you're all better.

We can think about a new training regimen
together.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I can't afford to waste time over something like
this!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I am extremely calm! That's why I—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh...
choice_data_list: You shouldn't move around too much.
You shouldn't move around too much.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Fine... I'll focus on getting better first.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What world are you living in?! I don't have the
time to think about my regimen!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I need to be out there making up for this lost time
as soon as physically possible!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We can train in a way that won't aggravate the
injury. I won't let some silly wound get in my way.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Patience is beside the—urgh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Groove tries to move, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Gasp, gasp... Even simple stretches are... tiring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's injury is more serious than she
realized.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: My regimen, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I suppose that's the best I can do for now. Even if
I'm not able to move as I wish, I can still use my
mind.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Very well. I'll bite.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This recent incident has revealed to us what level
of training will harm me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Perhaps this injury is a blessing in disguise.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now we can devise training regimens that won't
push me too far beyond what I'm capable of.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we discuss a training regimen that
would be effective and tough, while remaining
manageable.
